content: agent2: implementing process_priority param for click.edit() in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Will touch these two files.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. FYI in my sandbox copy of the repo the files still only show the original edit_file(filename) singular method - I don't see your edit_files rename applied here, so we may be working on separate copies. I've added process_priority to Editor.__init__ and Editor.edit_file (kwargs applied to subprocess.Popen), plus click.edit(process_priority=...) in termui.py. If our changes do get merged later, my part is additive to the Popen call inside edit_file/edit_files and should be easy to port to your edit_files(filenames) signature - just apply the same popen_kwargs there.
